ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sexes table */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the age_groups table */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the races table */,
  "prior_count_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the prior_counts table */,
  "two_year_recid_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the recidivism_outcomes table */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Current address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Date the individual was released from custody */,
  "reoffense_date" TEXT /* Date of reoffense, if applicable */,
  "reoffense_type" TEXT /* Type of reoffense, if applicable */,
  "rehab_program" TEXT /* Name of any rehabilitation program the individual participated in */,
  "program_completion" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the individual completed the rehabilitation program */,
  "last_known_activity" TEXT /* Last known activity or status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_prior_count_id FOREIGN KEY ("prior_count_id") REFERENCES prior_counts ("prior_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_two_year_recid_id FOREIGN KEY ("two_year_recid_id") REFERENCES recidivism_outcomes ("recidivism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex value */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group value */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., less_than_25, 25_to_45) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race value */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., African-American, Other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prior_counts" (
  "prior_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prior count value */,
  "prior_count_name" TEXT /* Name of the prior count (e.g., less_than_3, greater_than_10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prior_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recidivism_outcomes" (
  "recidivism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recidivism outcome value */,
  "recidivism_name" TEXT /* Name of the recidivism outcome (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recidivism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker, caseworker) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
